person.name: Margaret Pilkington

memoryArtifacts.headline: (The) history of the Lancashire family of Pilkington and its branches from 1066 to 1600. Compiled from deeds, charters, wills, inquisitions
Memorial
memoryArtifacts.description:
Margaret de Verdon and John Pilkington had nine children:

"7. Margaret, who married, 1st, Nicholas Griffin, who died 15 Hen. VI (1437) leaving 5 sons; and secondly Sir Thomas Savile [Savell] of Howle …

popularStory.headline: Memorial
popularStory.description: Sir Thomas Savile, son of Henry and Elizabeth was born abt 1381. He married Margaret Pilkington, daughter of Sir Thomas Pilkington. Of Thornhill, Tankersley and Eland, Thomas was heir to his cousin, …

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary: Margaret Pilkington was born in 1390 in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England. She married Nicholas Griffin in 1418 and they had at least 9 sons. Margaret Pilkington died in 1442 in Lancashire, England. She was also married to Sir Thomas Savile (1381-1449) was a member of the Savile family and the son of Henry Savile Esquire and Elizabeth Thornhill. He married Margaret Pilkington after 1436 in Yorkshire, England. They had at least one son and four daughters. Sir Thomas Savile was succeeded by his son, John Savile, who became the 10th, Lord Latimer.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Pilkington於1383年出生在英國越可爾恩爾時，她的父親Sir John de Pilkington Snr20歲，母親Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun32歲。她於1409年與Sir Thomas Savile結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1445年在英國諾薩普頓史爾布利沃斯享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Pilkington于1383年出生在英国越可爾恩爾时，她的父亲Sir John de Pilkington Snr20岁，母亲Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun32岁。她于1409年与Sir Thomas Savile结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1445年在英国諾薩普頓史爾布利沃斯享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pilkington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northwestern): habitational name from a place in Lancashire. The placename may derive from an Old English personal name Pīleca or Pīloc + patronymic -ing + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The surname is established in Ireland, where its presence was first recorded in the early 15th century.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Pilkington was born in 1383, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir John de Pilkington Snr, was 20 and her mother, Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun, was 32. She married Sir Thomas Savile in 1409. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1445, in Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Pilkington est née en 1383, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Pilkington Snr, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Savile en 1409. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1445, à Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Pilkington 1383 in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Pilkington Snr 20 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun 32. Sie hat 1409 Sir Thomas Savile geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1445 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Pilkington è nata il nel 1383 nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir John de Pilkington Snr, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Savile nel 1409. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1445, nel Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Pilkingtonが1383年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルで生まれた時，父Sir John de Pilkington Snrは20歳，母Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdunは32歳であった。1409年にSir Thomas Savileと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1445年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブリクスウオルスで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Pilkington(이)가 1383년 영국 요르크실르 토른힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Pilkington Snr(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1409년 Sir Thomas Savile(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1445년 영국 노르섬프토실르 브리스워스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Pilkington nasceu em 1383, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Pilkington Snr, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Savile em 1409. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1445, em Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Pilkington родилась в 1383 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Pilkington Snr было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Savile в 1409 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1445 г. в местности бриксворт, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.

Se casó con Sir Thomas Savile en 1409. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1445, en Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años.
